
```{r define_params}
# Define path to necessary data files
probeqc_files <- list.files("probeqc.dir/", full.names = TRUE)

qcmetrics_file <- grep("_metadata_QC.csv", probeqc_files)  # "*_metadata_QC.csv" output from pipeline probeqc
sample_qc_file <- grep("_sampleQCmetrics.csv", probeqc_files)  # "*_sampleQCmetrics" output from pipeline probeqc
fov_qc_file <- grep("_fovQCmetrics.csv", probeqc_files)  # "*_fovQCmetrics.csv" output from pipeline probeqc

# Define study-specific contrast variable (notably, to split plots)
x <- "condition"
```


# Overview

[Insert your study description here]

## Data import

[Importing sample, FOV and cell-level **metadata** from `spatialhub` probeqc pipeline]

```{r}
# Import metadata at different levels and set condition of interest
qc_sample <- read.csv(sample_qc_file)
qc_sample$group <- factor(as.character(qc_sample[, x]))

if (report == "fovQC") {
    qc_fov  <- read.csv(fov_qc_file)
    qc_fov$sample_index <- paste0(qc_fov$slide_id, "_", qc_fov$sample_name)
    qc_fov$group <- factor(as.character(qc_fov[, x]))
}

spx_meta <- read.csv(qcmetrics_file)
spx_meta$group <- factor(as.character(spx_meta[, x]))
```

* * *
